content: Reminder: the open meeting is taking place now, here is the link https://meet.google.com/vii-meij-xpw. All are welcome!
Did you keep any notes or remember some key points discussed? I wanted to attend but couldn't.

It wasn't too much special, just a rough overview of what is going on. Mostly just introductions, and then talked about https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/CAH5fLgiwRDcyaxbcUNY8M1c_w11vkCWyRfqVVrN9Sgc7XYT0xw@mail.gmail.com/T/#t
